results.title: Tech stocks surge 8% in 3 days: Can a declining rupee overshadow AI headwinds?
results.description: Nifty IT index surged over 4% for the third straight session as Infosys, Tech Mahindra, Coforge and TCS rallied sharply. Here’s why tech stocks are gaining despite concerns around AI disruption and slowing global growth.

results.title: Eicher Motors trades flat as Royal Enfield Greenfield push and VECV deal dominate buzz
results.description: At 11.31 am, the stock was at ₹6,904.50, down 0.12% or ₹8.50 from its previous close of ₹6,913
